=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
Graz, Austria, Eishalle Liebenau
2003.10.26

Unknown recording. Great sound. 
I received this concert very long time ago' and the folder was renamed as "Mad Dog Remaster" now changed in disc 1 and disc 2.

CD1

1 intro 2 To Be Alone With You (Bob on piano), 3 It's All Over Now, Baby Blue, (Bob on piano and harp, Larry onn pedal steel, Freddy on electric guitar, Tony on electric bass), 4 Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum (Bob on piano), 5 It Ain't Me, Babe (acoustic) (Bob on piano, Larry on cittern), 6 It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding) (acoustic) (Bob on piano, Larry on cittern), 7 Don't Think Twice, It's All Right (acoustic) (Bob on electric guitar, Larry on cittern), 8 Watching The River Flow (Bob on electric guitar, Larry on slide guitar), 9 Cold Irons Bound (Bob on electric guitar), 10 The Lonesome Death Of Hattie Carroll (acoustic), (Bob on piano and harp, Larry and Freddy on acoustic guitar, Tony on electric bass), 11 Stuck Inside Of Mobile With The Memphis Blues Again, (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on acoustic guitar), 12 Bye And Bye (Bob on piano, Tony on standup bass),

CD2

1 Honest With Me (Bob on piano, Larry on slide guitar), 2 Every Grain Of Sand (Bob on piano and harp), 3 Summer Days (Bob on piano, Tony on standup bass), 4 (encore), Cat's In The Well (Bob on piano), 5 Like A Rolling Stone (Bob on piano and harp), 6 All Along The Watchtower (Bob on piano and harp)
